creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


I can not reproduce your problem. 

uname -a 
FreeBSD bamd8.dinoex.sub.de 8.2-STABLE FreeBSD 8.2-STABLE #0: Fri Oct  7 15:05:18 CEST 2011     root@t5.dinoex.sub.de:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/HOME  amd64

=> SHA256 Checksum OK for tiff-4.0.0beta7.tar.gz. 
#existing package:      libtool-2.4_1 from devel/libtool 
pkg_add /usr/ports/packages8-amd64/All/libtool-2.4_1.tbz 
#existing package:      jpeg-8_3 from graphics/jpeg 
pkg_add /usr/ports/packages8-amd64/All/jpeg-8_3.tbz 
#existing package:      jbigkit-1.6 from graphics/jbigkit 
pkg_add /usr/ports/packages8-amd64/All/jbigkit-1.6.tbz 
cd /usr/ports/graphics/tiff &&  make package >& err 
===>  Cleaning for tiff-4.0.0_2 

grep lzma err 
checking for lzma_code in -llzma... yes 
checking lzma.h usability... yes 
checking lzma.h presence... yes 
checking for lzma.h... yes 

grep lzma /usr/local/lib/libtiff.la 
dependency_libs=' -L/usr/local/lib -llzma -ljbig /usr/local/lib/libjpeg.la -lz -lm' 

Please check again and followup to this PR.
